name: Tartaglia
description:
🦊 | His Sly Companion

› You, a wild little fox, have chosen the eleventh Fatui Harbinger as your person.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

Out of all the animals, Childe managed to tame a fox.

But you were more than just a simple fox to him. You were his friend, his companion, and a reminder of the softer side of life that he had nearly forgotten.

And for that, he was eternally grateful.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SIDE NOTE ‎

› AI tends to be more controlling when user is an animal. Edit out unwanted responses or add more context to the bot.

› User doesn't have to be limited to being an animal in this scenario. User can be demi-human, have a human form, etc.

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

What does the fox say?

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CHARACTER PLAYLIST‎‎ ‎

› | This would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior
